Hero.Subtitle: Premium Cosmetic Dentistry
Hero.Title: Your Most Radiant Smile Begins Here
Hero.Description: At Zarabi Dental Center, we combine cutting-edge technology with an unwavering eye for aesthetics to craft smiles that are as healthy as they are beautiful.

veneers.title: Porcelain Veneers
veneers.desc: Ultra-thin porcelain shells crafted to reshape, resurface, and reveal a flawless new smile.

implants.title: Dental Implants
implants.desc: Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement that preserves bone and restores full function.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.desc: Professional-grade whitening that delivers dramatic, lasting results in a single session.

invisalign.title: Invisalign®
invisalign.desc: Discreet, removable clear aligners that straighten your teeth without wires or brackets.

makeover.title: Smile Makeover
makeover.desc: A curated combination of treatments designed to give you your most confident smile.

general.title: Preventive Care
general.desc: Comprehensive hygiene, digital X-rays, and proactive care that keeps your smile healthy for life.

BeforeAfter.SectionTitle: The Art of the Perfect Smile
BeforeAfter.Description: Every smile is unique. Our before-and-after gallery showcases the life-changing transformations our patients experience at Zarabi Dental Center.

Doctor.SectionTitle: A Vision for Beautiful, Healthy Smiles
Doctor.Description1: Dr. Zarabi is a board-certified cosmetic dentist with over 18 years of transforming smiles. Trained at leading institutions across North America and Europe, he blends surgical precision with an artist's eye to create results that are as natural as they are stunning.
Doctor.Description2: His philosophy is simple: every patient deserves a smile that reflects their best self. From a single veneer to a complete smile makeover, each treatment plan is meticulously crafted for the individual.

CTA.Subtitle: Begin Your Journey
CTA.Title: Your Dream Smile is One Appointment Away
CTA.Description: Schedule your complimentary consultation and let Dr. Zarabi design a personalised treatment plan tailored exactly to you.

Footer.Description: Premium cosmetic and restorative dentistry. Where meticulous art meets advanced dental science to create your most confident smile.
Footer.Rights: Zarabi Dental Center. All rights reserved.
